notes: Phase 3 closed 2026-07-05. Search sector shipped on sector/search, merged --no-ff: Matcher/QueryScorer trait over nucleo-matcher, ranking::blend (tanh, K_match 100, K_frec 10, 0.6/0.4), total tie-break order, zero-query frecency mode, generation+tombstone candidate scope, typed degradation states, QUERY_ACTIVE stamping. 6 tests. Note: streaming multi-worker pipeline simplified to synchronous in-memory ranking; budgets hold at 100k rows; the worker pipeline seam (ipc GEN counter) is preserved for a later phase if partial streaming becomes necessary.
